{{Infobox character
| name = Elaina
| appears_in = The Traveler's Gate Trilogy
| introduced = The Crimson Vault
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Elaina is a character who appears in the narrative alongside [[Leah]] and [[Alin]]. During an interaction involving [[Vasha]], she is identified by name while pointing toward the individual's strength.}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Elaina is the daughter of [[Indirial]], characterized by her short blond hair and pale skin. She possesses her father's eyes and was once held captive within a cage. This imprisonment involved being kept in a dangling cage.}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Elaina]] is [[Indirial]]'s daughter and was held in a cage.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c17">''City of Light'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Elaina]] is held in a dangling cage.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c19">''City of Light'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Elaina]] is [[Indirial]]'s daughter.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c28">''City of Light'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Elaina]] has pale skin and short blond hair.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c28" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Elaina]] has her father's eyes.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c28" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
